lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or paint issues. The interior is in factory condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition, showing no signs of wear or use. All mechanical and electronic systems are fully functional and operate as new.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional daily driver, though it clearly shows its age and mileage. Mechanically, the engine starts reliably and performs well on short trips, but there is a persistent slow oil leak that requires regular monitoring. The suspension feels a bit soft and may need attention in the near future. Visually, the exterior has several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the driver-side door, while the interior shows significant wear on the driver's seat and some light staining on the carpets. Most electronic features work as intended, though the infotainment system occasionally lags. This is an honest car for someone looking for basic transportation who is prepared for some upcoming maintenance.

Looking for a budget-friendly project or a reliable source of parts? This vehicle has certainly lived a full life and shows significant wear, but it's an incredible opportunity for a mechanic or a DIY enthusiast to roll up their sleeves and bring some utility back to a car at a fantastic price!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with visible rust along the rocker panels, several large dents, and paint that has faded and begun to peel in multiple areas. Inside, the cabin requires a deep clean; the upholstery is torn in several places, and the headliner

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and road-readiness. While showing minor signs of previous use consistent with its history, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of its class. A distinguished choice for those seeking exceptional value without compromising on performance.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next big adventure? I’m selling my car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep it running smoothly. It’s perfect for someone who wants a quality vehicle without the brand-new price tag. I’m really going to miss this one, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sorted example of the legendary S54 platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and delivers linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. Recent preventative maintenance includes a VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring the chassis remains rigid under high lateral loads. Equipped with the factory variable M differential lock and a MacPherson strut front/multi-link rear suspension, the turn-in remains sharp and communicative. While the aesthetic shows honest patina consistent with a well-loved driver, the powertrain remains robust, retaining the visceral induction note and high-RPM urgency that defines the M division's heritage.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance records available. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs great.

This vehicle is a well-maintained example that strikes a perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior presents beautifully with a glossy finish, showing only the minor cosmetic imperfections one would expect from a carefully driven car. Inside, the cabin remains highly inviting; the seats are supportive and clean, the climate control is ice-cold, and all integrated technology functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a consistent service history and recent fluid checks. It handles with precision and offers a solid, rattle-free driving experience. This is a dependable, honest car ready for its next owner to drive away with total confidence.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term value. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. A sophisticated choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent performance and a sophisticated road presence. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a premium automotive experience and long-term reliability. This offering represents a superior balance of value and quality, ready for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to drive. It’s been really well-taken care of and is still looking great and running super smooth! It is the perfect reliable daily driver for someone who wants quality without the brand-new price tag. I’ve loved every mile in this car, and I just know you will too—come take it for a spin!

This 2011 Cayman S is a purist’s spec, featuring the 3.4L DFI flat-six engine paired with a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The mid-engine chassis dynamics are enhanced by factory-optioned PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management) and a mechanical limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a complete cooling system refresh and updated rear control arms to ensure optimal toe-in and structural rigidity
Good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance completed. Reliable performance. Price firm.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, blending performance with long-term reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, having been regularly waxed and garaged; however, close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership, featuring supple leather upholstery that remains free of tears or significant wear. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, with a comprehensive service history documenting regular oil changes and proactive maintenance. The tires show plenty of tread depth, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. While it shows the gentle character of a pre-owned vehicle, its overall presentation and mechanical integrity make it a standout choice for a discerning buyer seeking value without compromising on quality.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the car exhibits consistent performance and has been preserved to a high standard of care. It stands as a testament to quality engineering and a reliable ownership history, ensuring a premium driving experience.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing refined performance with proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, the automobile features a comprehensive service history and an interior that reflects responsible ownership. Its mechanical integrity ensures a confident driving experience, while the exterior retains a sharp, professional aesthetic. This offering stands as a testament to enduring quality and remains a premier choice within its class.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It still runs like a dream and looks great parked in the driveway! If you're looking for a dependable car that’s ready for its next adventure, this is definitely the one. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. Mechanically robust, the VANOS system has been professionally serviced, and the rear subframe—a known weak point—has been reinforced for structural integrity. The chassis remains tight with a factory-spec limited-slip differential providing excellent power delivery out of corners. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the performance remains razor-sharp. Recent service includes a valve adjustment and fresh bushings across the suspension. It’s an analog driver’s machine with a linear power band and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car in good condition. Maintenance current. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

Experience a perfect balance of reliability and style with this well-maintained vehicle. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with gentle use, while the body remains straight and structurally sound. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the seats are supportive and free of significant wear, and all interior electronics—including the infotainment system and climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, a testament to a consistent service history and documented preventative maintenance. This car offers a turnkey driving experience, providing the comfort and performance of a premium vehicle without the new-car price tag. It is a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a quality pre-owned ride that has been treated with care.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven mechanical integrity. This specimen represents an exceptional balance of performance and value, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. A turnkey opportunity for the discerning driver seeking reliability and sophistication without compromise.
